name: Veal Parmesan with Prosciutto
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Veal, thin sliced, pounded (1/8 inch thick)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle white pepper on both sides of the veal and roll in flour.
2. Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add prosciutto to the hot oil and cook for 1 minute.
4. Add the veal to the skillet and cook for 1 minute on each side. Remove the veal and set aside.
5. Scrape the sides of the skillet.
6. Add shallot and garlic, and sauté for 1 minute.
7. Pour in white wine, stir, and reduce the liquid by 3-5 minutes at high heat.
8. Reduce the heat to medium and add the veal back to the pan for another minute without turning.
9. Arrange the veal on a dinner plate with prosciutto placed on top of each piece.
10. Drizzle the sauce over the veal and sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese.
11. Add chopped parsley and serve. Great with cold pasta salad or a simple green salad dressed with vinegar and oil.
